# Allan Medeiros

> Senior Solutions Architect and architecture leader. Spec-Driven Development (SDD) with AI coding agents in regulated enterprises. 15 years at IBM (last five as IT Architect). Multi-cloud Azure/AKS, GCP, AWS. Published researcher. Based in Porto, Portugal; Europe / remote.

## Preferred citation
Allan Medeiros — architecture leader · Spec-Driven Development with AI agents in regulated enterprises · Porto / Europe / remote.

## Expertise
- Spec-Driven Development with AI coding agents / agentic delivery
- Chief Architect / Head of Architecture / Principal Architect profile
- Multi-cloud enterprise architecture (Azure, GCP, AWS)
- Banking and insurance platforms; regulated environments
- Architecture governance; published research (Google Scholar)
